title: Antalya All-Inclusive Beach Week
description: Seven nights on the Turkish Riviera with all-inclusive meals, a private beach club, and daily shuttle to Old Town Kaleici.

title: Pyramids & Nile Cruise
description: Three nights in Cairo with guided tours of Giza and Saqqara, plus a four-night Nile cruise from Luxor to Aswan.

title: Phuket Island Hopping
description: Ten days across Phuket, Phi Phi and Krabi: speedboat tours, snorkeling at Maya Bay, and a Phang Nga sea-cave kayak trip.

title: Dubai City & Desert Weekend
description: Burj Khalifa observation deck, Dubai Mall fountain show, a desert safari with dune-bashing and a Bedouin-style dinner.

title: Rome, Florence & the Tuscan Hills
description: Colosseum and Vatican skip-the-line, three nights in Florence with an Uffizi tour, and a Chianti wine-tasting day trip.

title: Barcelona Art & Tapas
description: Sagrada Familia, Park Güell, Picasso Museum, and an evening tapas crawl through Gothic Quarter and El Born.

title: Santorini Sunset Escape
description: Cave-hotel stay in Oia, a catamaran cruise around the caldera, and day trips to the volcanic hot springs of Palea Kameni.

title: Maldives Overwater Villa
description: Seven nights in a private overwater villa with daily breakfast, a sunset dolphin cruise, and one guided reef-snorkeling tour.

title: Tokyo & Kyoto Discovery
description: Cherry-blossom timing in Tokyo, a bullet train to Kyoto, temples of Higashiyama, and a half-day Nara deer-park excursion.

title: Bali Wellness Retreat
description: Eight days in Ubud: daily yoga, a Balinese cooking class, Tegallalang rice-terrace trek, and two spa sessions included.

title: Paris in Spring
description: Eiffel Tower second-floor entry, Louvre and Musee d'Orsay guided tours, a Seine river cruise, and a Montmartre walking morning.

title: Reykjavik Northern Lights
description: Aurora hunting nights, Golden Circle full-day tour, Blue Lagoon spa entry, and a glacier-and-ice-cave excursion on Vatnajokull.
